Home Publications Research

Bernat Font Garcia

 Publications Research

Welcome! I am Bernat Font Garcia, currently a PhD Candidate of the Aerodynamics and Flight Mechanics group at the University of Southampton (UK) aiming to graduate in 2020. My PhD is in Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) and in this personal webpage (still under construction) you will find a summary of my research and interests.

I am currently based at the Fluid Dynamics group of the Institute of High Performance Computing (Singapore) as part of a collaboration programme between the University of Southampton and the Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR).

My PhD is focused on studying and modelling the complex physics encountered on the wake of a circular cylinder at high Reynolds $\left(Re\right)$ regimes. In particular, we have recently investigated the transition from 3-D to 2-D turbulence on the wake of flow past a circular cylinder at $Re=10^4$. On-going research is set on developing a low-dimensional data-driven model for the turbulent wake.

©2019 Bernat Font Garcia
